subject: First Aid & Safety
title: Cleaning Product Dangers
description: A short lesson to help you apply Cleaning Product Dangers.

hook.text: Mix bleach and ammonia and you create chloramine gas—the same class as a WWI weapon.

buildup.text: Household cleaners contain powerful chemicals that are safe when used alone, as directed.

discovery.text: Mixing bleach with acids creates chlorine gas. Mixing it with ammonia creates chloramines.

twist.text: Many people accidentally create toxic gases by combining common bathroom and kitchen cleaners.

climax.text: Ventilation, reading labels, and never mixing products prevent most chemical accidents.

punchline.text: Read the label. The most dangerous chemistry lab is under your sink.

quiz.question: What happens when bleach is mixed with ammonia?
